title: Were Neanderthals Culturally Modern Humans? - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews geneticist David Reich on whether Neanderthals possessed cultural modernity comparable to modern humans. The discussion explores archaeological and genetic evidence regarding Neanderthal cognitive abilities, behavior, and cultural sophistication.
